command:
cd ~/Documents/Projects/Hyo && python3 -c '
import json
with open("website/data/feed.json") as f:
    data = json.load(f)
for r in data.get("reports",[]):
    rid = r.get("id","?")
    date = r.get("date","?")
    rtype = r.get("type","?")
    title = r.get("title","?")[:60]
    author = r.get("author","?")
    print(rid + " | " + date + " | " + rtype + " | " + author + " | " + title)
'
